home.vision.title: Our Vision
home.vision.content: To establish a thriving open source culture that drives innovation, collaboration, and technological excellence across our organization.
home.mission.title: Our Mission
home.mission.content: To enable and support open source adoption, contribution, and compliance throughout the organization while fostering a collaborative ecosystem with the broader open source community.
